fields.title: Ralph nuke crashes on invalid loop state
fields.description: In /home/ribelo/projects/retailic/dashborb, pi startup fails because .pi/loops/state/dashborb-1k1.json has a stale Ralph pinnedExecutionProfile missing model. Running /ralph nuke also crashes because nuke/list paths decode invalid state before deleting. Ralph nuke should remove invalid loop state files without requiring schema decode, and startup/UI paths should not crash the whole pi process.
